content: Test inquiry for Gmail integration verification
email_body:
Hello,

This is a test email to verify that the autonomous AI employee system is correctly:
1. Processing email inquiries from Inbox
2. Creating customers and leads in Odoo
3. Sending automated email responses via Gmail

If you receive an automated response to this email, the system is working correctly.

Test timestamp: 2026-04-11 01:45:00

Best regards,
System Administrator
